signals.headline: South Korea Annual Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026, Below Forecasts | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in prior months, missing market expectations of 2.4% and aligning near the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid Middle East energy volatility; this fresh data could shift prediction markets on BoK rate holds or Asia inflation
